BRIDGE men IN DISGUST L


TELL CITY THEY ARE DONE

pages.raw_text:

help.


The scale of the bridge AMI 6ffuc-
taral iron men is $3.50 per dayfan
the. board of public works tried to
make distinction between the
men that worked on the ground and
those actively employed on the
bridge. They wanted to pay the
bridge men on the ground 81 and
those on the bridge $3.50.


There have been numerous pro-
tests by the men and promises by
the officials to make good, but the
matter never was settled and the
men quit yesterday. Today the head
boss of the structural work, J. Stew
art, walked off the job in sympathy
with his men. Stewart carries a
card in the. union.


The bridge and structural men
point to the following private firms
who are paying the scale: Nc
Creery & Willard, Garrett e Gar
rett, Arnot & Huyck, B. Farney
Construction Co., William Oliver
All Of thes firms pay $3.50 for eight
hours.


The city will have trouble in find
ing scab bridge men to do the work.
